name: prompt-workflows
description: Thirty-five reusable workflows for model routing, personal productivity, code comprehension, knowledge systems, agent evaluation, consumer AI strategy, and Office documents.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable decision, analysis, and productivity workflows.
interface.longDescription: A portable library of 35 workflows spanning model selection, personal operations, code comprehension, knowledge architecture, agent evaluation, consumer AI strategy, and evidence-grounded Office document work.
defaultPrompt: Help me choose the right workflow for this task.
Audit this workflow before I automate it.
Turn these sources into an evidence-backed brief.
